# coder-SIN-Qwen

> Standalone relay proxy that sends project context to Qwen via browser UI automation and returns the answer.

## Documentation
- [README](https://github.com/OpenSIN-Browser-Use-Agents/coder-SIN-Qwen/blob/main/README.md) - Quick start, features, architecture
- [Architecture](https://github.com/OpenSIN-Browser-Use-Agents/coder-SIN-Qwen/blob/main/docs/architecture.md) - Detailed system design
- [Contributing](https://github.com/OpenSIN-Browser-Use-Agents/coder-SIN-Qwen/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to contribute
- [Changelog](https://github.com/OpenSIN-Browser-Use-Agents/coder-SIN-Qwen/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) - Version history
- [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/OpenSIN-Browser-Use-Agents/coder-SIN-Qwen/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

## Key Information
- License: MIT
- Language: JavaScript (Node.js 20+)
- Package Manager: pnpm
- Protocol: Browser CDP Automation
- Repo: https://github.com/OpenSIN-Browser-Use-Agents/coder-SIN-Qwen
